description_long: This is a sleek, futuristic fighter-style airplane with a streamlined fuselage and sharply angled wings. The body is predominantly white with bold red accents and black detailing, giving it a high-tech, aggressive appearance. The cockpit is enclosed with a transparent canopy, positioned near the front of the fuselage, and appears to be single-seat. The rear features three prominent jet engines, each with a metallic finish and blue-tinted exhausts, flanked by twin vertical stabilizers. The wings are low-mounted and swept back, with integrated red stripes and aerodynamic fairings. The overall design suggests high speed and agility, suitable for advanced urban or sci-fi environments.
description: A futuristic, white and red fighter-style airplane with swept-back wings, triple rear jet engines, and a single-seat cockpit under a clear canopy.
description_view_0: Front view showing the pointed nose, central cockpit canopy, and symmetrical wing layout with red accents.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the elongated fuselage, low-mounted swept wings, and the three rear jet engines with visible exhausts.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the trio of jet engines, blue-tinted exhausts, and twin vertical stabilizers.
description_view_3: Opposite side view similar to view 1, showing the same wing and engine configuration with visible surface details.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Low-wing, swept-back configuration with no visible winglets or dihedral/anhedral angles; wings are integrated smoothly into the fuselage.
attribute_engine_type: Triple rear-mounted jet engines with visible exhausts.
attribute_tail_design: Twin vertical stabilizers with a conventional horizontal stabilizer, forming an H-tail configuration.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Retractable landing gear, with main and nose gear units implied but not visibly extended.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed single-seat cockpit with a clear canopy integrated into the fuselage.
